## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, localization, and technical implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Spanish translations will be AI-generated and reviewed by the Adventures Group team for accuracy and local nuances](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO content streams focusing on tours and monthly activities are being developed](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Technical challenges around image selection, cropping, and content publishing need to be addressed with the CTO](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
  - [Pillar pages will be created as comprehensive blog posts rather than changing the existing blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=2336.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Localization

  - [AI translations for Spanish content will be implemented, with Adventures Group team reviewing for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [SEO opportunities identified for keyword localization (e.g., "Puerto Vallarta seguro" vs "Puerto Vallarta segura")](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Content OS dashboard in Airtable created to manage workflows and track content progress](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Two programmatic SEO content streams proposed: tours focus and monthly activities in each destination](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)

### Technical Implementation Challenges

  - [Need to establish a process for publishing articles, selecting photos, and cropping images](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
  - [Automation needs identified:](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
      - [Image selection and tagging](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
      - [Adapting image sizes](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
      - [Publishing to Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
  - [Discussion needed with CTO about API connections and filling required fields in Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)

### Content Planning and Organization

  - [Tours by month spreadsheet to be created, highlighting primary and secondary tours for each destination](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Pillar pages to be developed as comprehensive blog posts rather than changing existing blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=2336.0)
  - [Consideration for mobile users (70% of traffic) in content presentation](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)

### Collaboration and Workflow

  - [Weekly reports to be sent on Mondays detailing current work and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Articles to be sent for approval via Slack or email before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/cCUkynzs88vmsFjdk2Ns6DcX8P-QL44n?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

## Next Steps

1.  Adventures Group to review Spanish translations of safety and nightlife articles
2.  Mariana to send links to Spanish article drafts for review
3.  Adventures Group to create spreadsheet of tours by month for each destination
4.  Hector to share existing banner designs with Mariana
5.  Isabel to provide photo specifications (size, format, quality) to Mariana
6.  Mariana to compile automation needs and discuss with CTO
7.  Schedule meeting between Adventures Group and GrowthX CTO to review Sanity CMS setup
8.  Mariana to start building programmatic SEO workflows and ideas
9.  Begin localizing safety and nightlife articles for other destinations and Spanish versions
